title: An Act updating Massachusetts student transportation

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Crighton, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 3021) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Brendan P. Crighton for legislation to update Massachusetts student transportation.  Public Safety and Homeland Security.
